item.title: Power (Chainsaw Man cosplay) by Nancy Novikova
item.description:
Hi! I'm a dreadlocked cosplayer, retoucher, nomad and streamer ;) Glad you stopped by :) Visit my social media to see more: instagram.com/nancy_reality (ENG)
Exclusive content and support me: patreon.com/nancy_reality boosty.to/madebynancy ko-fi.com/nancynovikova
reference pic
item.dc:creator: NancyNovikova

item.title: How 'bout some love for Tim Curry
item.description:
Magnificent portrayer of Dr. Fankenfurter Front page edit! Mr. Curry has regained the use of his voice, and recently recorded his biography NYT- Laura Collins-Hughes
Don't hate me because I'm beautiful.
item.dc:creator: evildadunit

item.title: You guys helped keep me busy- thank you!
item.description: I’m going to unpack, repack, repeat until I go to bed tomorrow night, but this is still huge progress! From something markedly fucking up my life for 2-3 WEEKS down to 2-3 DAYS is pretty great Please feel free to share whatever you’re comfortable about with your own experience with OCD, from helpful tricks to the truly unhinged. You have permission away from the NTs who think sharing an experience is the same as “making it all about yourself”
item.dc:creator: stonedlikeicheckedoutmedusa

item.title: Robert De Niro: "King Donald The First. Fuck That."
item.description: "I'm Robert De Niro – Asking you to stand up and be counted in the nationwide No Kings protest on October 18th."

item.title: Two men claiming to be some form of law enforcement attempting to kidnap a passenger from the subway in New York.
item.description: If this was real law enforcement they would have placed that guy under arrest and put cuffs or zip ties on him instead of half heartedly and silently tugging at his shirt.

item.dc:creator: Grogu007

item.title: Happy Indigenous Peoples day!
item.description:
There are over 23 soverign tribes in my Home state of New Mexico, each with their own culture, laws and rules, and unique history. I feel very blessed to be around these many rich cultures.
ALso, This too. Many many indigenous people suffered under Columbus. Read a couple of books, {A People's History of the United States} by Howard Zinn: And {Christopher Columbus – Hero Or Villain?: The Truth Behind the Man Who Changed the World} by Alan Rogers
Nap Tax
item.dc:creator: Wrest216

item.title: In my spare time, I am working on a mapmaking tool
item.dc:creator: mightofmerchants

item.title: Seattle getting a national guard invasion in 3,2,1
item.description:
Probably a minute before the Trump administration will retaliate, but we can enjoy it for the second it lasts. Tried to tag political, but it's not available [get it together Imgur]!
Sauce: SEA Airport won't play video of Kristi Noem blaming Democrats for government shutdown | king5.com https://www.king5.com/article/news/local/sea-airport-wont-play-video-kristi-noem-blaming-democrats-government-shutdown/281-30734f89-6445-4f17-9df6-033f90660edb
item.dc:creator: DesdemonaMoor

item.title: Well, that escalated quickly.
item.description: EDIT: Sadly I dunno the sauce. EDIT2: Thanks for the frontpage again, imgurians! I hope you have a nice week! I do reviews as a hobby, and this week I made a review of "Neverending Story" Yes, the classic. If you feel up to see it, check here! https://youtu.be/qAt8ZX6nOFM

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1493 (snail victory)
item.description:
Happy indigenous people's day. Let's get this bread.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "it's okay." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Obligatory Fuck Christopher Columbus post
item.description: Most viral edit: Thanks for the upvotes and accolades, my dudes. He ded, that’s the good news. My only plug for this edit would be a song, Electric Pow Wow Drum- Halluci Nation.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: Assorted hip hop and adjacent genres meme dump (pt. 4)
item.description: 57 random memes all about hip hop and adjacent genres. Enjoy! Been going through my collection of memes that has been building over 10+ years and figured I'd share with Imgur. This is the final dump of hip hop/rap/R&B memes but there are plenty of other dumps planned. I've got 50,000+ memes across hundreds of categories so there will be a lot more coming.
item.dc:creator: joncw2
